generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Thermometer1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Thermometer2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Thermometer3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique ID, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C (±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB MOSFETs for high-current (4A) switching"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB optocouplers for signal isolation, operating at 12V or 24V"
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB featuring MOSFETs for high-current switching and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heatbed and fan actuators"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component, DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management and voltage/current sensing"
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyCalibration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares solver for model parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication between DS18S20 thermometers and Raspberry Pi"
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MOSFETs for high-current (4A) switching in PCB design"
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optocouplers for signal isolation in PCB design"
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment for executing thermal simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for safety and optimality monitoring services"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of data transmission via RabbitMQ"
]

instance CalibrationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration results for thermal models"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected in thermal system requiring immediate adjustment"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suboptimal performance detected in thermal system requiring adjustment"
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting sensor data via RabbitMQ message broker"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating Model A and Model B parameters using Scipy non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResultInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating temperature predictions using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting safety violations and optimizing performance based on temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityInsight
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Thermometer1, DS18S20Thermometer2, DS18S20Thermometer3
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ActuatorStatesDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from three DS18S20 thermometers"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB
]

instance PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply voltage and current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyVoltageCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB
]

instance ActuatorStatesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current states of heatbed and fan actuators"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActuatorStatesDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelA, ModelB
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air (air heat capacity), G_box (box thermal conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibration, SimulationEngine
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater (heater heat capacity), C_air (air heat capacity), G_heater (heater thermal conductance), G_box (box thermal conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibration, SimulationEngine
]

instance SystemAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust system parameters or actuators to correct safety or optimality violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Container, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, DS18S20Thermometer1, DS18S20Thermometer2, DS18S20Thermometer3, RaspberryPi4Controller, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes the commands on the physical actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ where the physical twin's controller and low-level driver interact with digital twin components (simulation models, monitoring) through message queues, as illustrated in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (the DT integrates models and data from the deployed physical system for real-time monitoring and prediction)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through uniform temperature tests (Assumption 1) and parameter calibration via residual error minimization; Model B showed better prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker running on Raspberry Pi, using Wi-Fi/Bluetooth for network connectivity, with data transmitted via message queues between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, and controller all running on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed."
]
